form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Not raced for 42 days. First-up 5th of 9 at this track in LR on February 2 over 1207m, 10 len behind Cactus League carrying 55.5kg at $5.90. Last start in a small field at this track on February 24 over 1207m, 10 len behind Court Of Appeal with 56kg at $14.20. The rails draw brings him right into calculations.
